### What would you like the tool to do?

<!-- Plain language. -->

### Use case

<!-- Concrete: which kind of site, what the current behaviour misses,
what success looks like. -->

### Proposed CLI shape

```sh
# Optional. The proposed command, flags, and example output.
geosuite-sitemap-builder <url> --…
```

### Sample input → expected output

If your suggestion changes parsing, traversal, or rendering, a small
before/after example is the fastest way to align on scope.

### Alternatives considered

<!-- Optional. Other tools / libraries / approaches you tried. -->

### Does this stay zero-runtime-dependency?

> The deterministic core of the tool ships without any third-party
> runtime deps. If your feature requires one (e.g. headless browser,
> LLM provider SDK), call it out — opt-in features behind a flag are
> generally fine, but they need a clear rationale and a privacy note.
